data.description: Zelenskyy approved the extension of martial law and mobilization for another three months

data.title: Inception Growth Acquisition Limited postpones special meeting to August 8, 2025, regarding proposed business combination with AgileAlgo Holdings Ltd.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, Inception Growth Acquisition Limited, a blank check company, announced the postponement of its special meeting to August 8, 2025. The meeting, which did not conduct any business, was adjourned concerning all proposals outlined in the definitive proxy statement filed with the SEC on May 27, 2025, along with the supplement released on June 26, 2025. This includes the vote on the potential business merger with AgileAlgo Holdings Ltd.

data.title: Volkswagen loses $1.5 billion in profit due to Trump tariffs, revises yearly forecast downward.
data.description: According to recent reports, a prominent German car manufacturer disclosed that import tariffs imposed by the United States had a detrimental impact on its profits, resulting in a reduction of approximately $1.5 billion during the initial six months of the year. Consequently, the company has revised its projections for the entire year due to this significant financial setback.

data.title: Arizona woman gets 8.5 years for aiding North Korea hackers in targeting 300 US crypto and tech firms, making $17M.
data.description: In the state of Arizona, a woman has been given a sentence of 8.5 years for her involvement in assisting North Korean hackers in breaching more than 300 American cryptocurrency and technology companies. The illegal activities conducted by the hackers resulted in a total of $17 million in illicit profits.

data.title: $9.7B OG Bitcoin moved by Galaxy, additional $1.1B to exchanges. Analysts foresee minimal market impact.
data.description: Crypto market analysts predict that the recent $9.7 billion transaction in blockchain technology could be assimilated by the market without causing any major impact.

data.title: Weekly tech news recap: Highlights 11 press releases, incl. PayPal World launch & PR Newswire's AI content optimization tools. Jul 25, 2025.

This announcement was made on July 25, 2025, in New York. Among the key developments were the introduction of PayPal World and PR Newswire's capabilities to optimize content for AI search. These innovations mark significant progress in the tech industry, aiming to improve user experiences and streamline processes. Stay updated on the latest tech advancements with PR Newswire to experience the cutting-edge solutions shaping the digital landscape.

data.title: Seoul Design Foundation to showcase at Maison&Objet Paris from Sep 4-8, 2025. Great opportunity for Seoul's design brands.
data.description: The Seoul Design Foundation is set to take part in Maison&Objet Paris from September 4 to 8, 2025.

data.title: XPENG expands into Indonesia, producing X9 locally, marking its global localization strategy debut.
data.description: In recent developments, the local government has reported a significant increase in new COVID-19 cases. A total of 350 new cases have been recorded in the past 24 hours, bringing the total number of confirmed cases in the region to 5,200. This surge in cases has prompted authorities to implement stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, the number of hospitalizations has also seen a notable rise, with 45 new patients admitted for COVID-19 treatment, bringing the total number of hospitalizations to 320. The government is urging residents to adhere to safety guidelines and take necessary precautions to protect themselves and others from the virus.

data.title: Southside Bancshares, Inc. reported second quarter: net income $21.8M, earnings per share $0.72, annualized return on assets 1.07%, annualized return on tangible common equity 14.38%, nonperforming assets low at 0.39% of total assets. Total assets $8.34B, total deposits $6.63B, and net loans $4.56B at the end of June 30, 2025. Noninterest income increased to $12.1M, noninterest expense $39.3M, and income before tax $26.5M. Nonperforming assets $32.9M with nonaccruing loans at $4.9M. Total assets $8.34B, total liabilities $7.53B, shareholders' equity $807.2M at the end of June 30, 2025.
data.description: Southside Bancshares, Inc. reported a second-quarter net income of $21.8 million, with earnings per diluted common share at $0.72. The tax-equivalent net interest margin increased by nine basis points to 2.95%. The annualized return on average assets was 1.07%, and on tangible common equity was 14.38%. Adjustments were made for nonperforming assets remaining low at 0.39% of total assets. Net income decreased by 11.6% compared to the same period in 2024. Total loans were $4.60 billion, deposits at $6.63 billion, and total assets at $8.34 billion. The company repurchased shares and declared a cash dividend of $0.36 per share. Additionally, Southside Bancshares discussed its financial performance, growth, expenses, dividends, shareholder equity, total assets, debt, and asset quality ratios. Non-GAAP financial measures were also provided. The company's financial results were affected by factors such as interest income, net interest income, provision for credit losses, noninterest income, noninterest expenses, and income tax expenses.

data.title: Dorian LPG Ltd. (NYSE: LPG) to disclose Q1 earnings on Aug 1, 2025; no pre-release numbers, conference call to follow.
data.description: Dorian LPG Ltd., a top owner and operator of modern and ECO very large gas carriers, will release its financial results for the first quarter ending June 30, 2025, on August 1, 2025. The Company, listed on NYSE as LPG, will issue a news release prior to the market open without pre-release numbers based on investor feedback. An Earnings Conference Call is scheduled for the same day to discuss the results.

data.title: Carter's, Inc. reports positive Q2 2025 results with sales stabilization. Direct-to-consumer sales grow in U.S., Canada, Mexico. CEO optimistic.
data.description: Atlanta-based Carter’s, Inc. (NYSE:CRI), the leading apparel company for babies and young children in North America, recently disclosed its financial results for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025. CEO and President Douglas C. Palladini highlighted the company's progress, noting a stabilizing sales performance and growing momentum. The direct-to-consumer segment saw a notable increase in sales in the U.S., Canada, and Mexico. This positive trend indicates growth for Carter’s, Inc. in key markets.

data.title: Key press releases: Southwest Airlines' seat policy, PayPal World debut, PepsiCo's prebiotic cola. NY, July 25, 2025. Thousands of press releases weekly.
data.description: Southwest Airlines has implemented a new seat selection policy, while PayPal World has been introduced to the market. PepsiCo has also launched a prebiotic cola. This news was disclosed in New York on July 25, 2025. Amidst a plethora of press releases shared every week, it can be challenging for journalists to stay updated on PR Newswire. The constant flow of information includes details about the latest developments - such as Southwest Airlines' changes, PayPal World's debut, and PepsiCo's innovative product.

data.title: Aon plc (NYSE: AON) reported 11% total revenue growth and 6% organic revenue growth for Q2 2025. Executing Aon United strategy.
data.description: In Dublin on July 25, 2025, Aon plc (NYSE: AON) announced their financial results for the quarter ending June 30, 2025. The company experienced substantial growth with total revenue increasing by 11% and organic revenue growing by 6%. This success is attributed to the effective implementation of their Aon United strategy, demonstrating their commitment to delivering strong performance.

data.title: Porter Airlines pilots start training in Montreal with new simulator, boosting local job opportunities. - E195-E2, Embraer simulator.
data.description: A newly constructed simulator developed in Canada is set to generate employment and open up prospects for the nearby community, located in Montreal. On July 25, 2025, Porter Airlines and Embraer CAE Training Services (ECTS) unveiled plans to enhance the airline's pilot training endeavors through the deployment of an advanced Embraer simulator. This move is expected to usher in training opportunities for pilots, creating a positive impact with new job openings and career prospects within the local area.

data.title: OSI Digital acquires ERP Buddies to enhance Oracle NetSuite capabilities, solidifying mid-market ERP position.
data.description: OSI Digital has recently acquired ERP Buddies, a move that bolsters their Oracle NetSuite capabilities and solidifies their presence in the mid-market ERP sector. This acquisition, announced on July 25, 2025 in Calabasas, California, highlights OSI Digital's commitment to expansion and enhancement in the industry. As a prominent global digital transformation provider, OSI Digital's acquisition of ERP Buddies signifies a significant step towards further growth and innovation in the sector.
